title: Thai-Style Sea Bass with Tom Yum Sauce
description: A flavorful and healthy Thai-inspired dish featuring succulent sea bass in a tangy Tom Yum sauce.

ingredients.name: Tom Yum Soup Paste
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Season the sea bass fillets with salt and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine Tom Yum soup paste, coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, Thai basil, ginger, and red chili (if using). Blend until smooth.
Transfer the sauce to a saucepan and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low and let sauce simmer for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sea bass fillets and sear for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the sea bass to a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes.
Serve the sea bass with the Tom Yum sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with additional Thai basil and serve immediately.
